Chronology of every recorded fact about [[drudge]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 16''' — A drudge is a creature that can be set to follow sword madra.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 11''' — A drudge is a construct used by Gesha to dismantle Remnants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 12''' — A drudge is a Soulsmith's most valued construct and serves as an assistant, toolbox, and encyclopedia of information.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 12''' — Drudges are designed to scan the structure of a dead Remnant and look for concentrations of power called bindings.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — A drudge is a spider-construct used by Gesha.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — A drudge is a spider-construct.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — A drudge is a creature with eight long spider legs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — Fisher Gesha has a drudge that carries her along the flagstones.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — A drudge is a construct that can be made to exist in low-energy environments.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
